overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a driving simulator showing a nighttime drive in heavy rain on a multi-lane highway, transitioning into an enclosed tunnel. The perspective is from inside a BMW with visible dashboard and steering wheel, following other vehicles through wet conditions.

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway during a rainy night, following a blue sports car. The windshield wipers work continuously to clear the heavy rain. A red sedan overtakes on the left as the vehicle passes under an overpass.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a tunnel entrance flanked by tall concrete sound barriers. The green sports car appears in the left lane as the vehicle enters the tunnel, transitioning from the rainy outdoor environment to the artificially lit enclosed space.

segments.scene_description: Driving through the enclosed tunnel with artificial overhead lighting. The rain has stopped but the road remains wet. Following a red sedan while a white sedan cruises parallel in the right lane. An orange vehicle is visible on the left side of the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a BMW as a rainy nighttime highway drive transitions into the artificial glow of an enclosed tunnel. It begins on a multi-lane road under heavy rain, with windshield wipers working constantly while following a blue sports car and passing under an overpass as a red sedan overtakes on the left. As the vehicle approaches the tunnel entrance, the open road is replaced by tall concrete sound barriers and the appearance of a green sports car in the left lane. The scene then shifts from the stormy outdoor environment into the tunnel, where the rain ceases and the lighting transforms into a steady artificial overhead glow. Finally, the camera cruises through the enclosed space on the wet pavement, following a red sedan while a white sedan and an orange vehicle flank the car on either side.
